pageTimings.text: A circle is round. The sun is a circle. A wheel is a circle.
A square has four equal sides. A window is a square. A cracker is a square.
A triangle has three sides. A pizza slice is a triangle. A roof is a triangle.
A rectangle has four sides. Two sides are long, two are short. A door is a rectangle. A book is a rectangle.
A star has five points. We see stars in the night sky.
An oval is like a stretched circle. An egg is an oval. A leaf is an oval.
Shapes are everywhere! Can you find shapes today?
